display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 530px; height: 1px; padding-top: 183px; margin-left: 106px;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1) Installation Layer
• install.sh
• detects package manager (apt/dnf/pacman/brew/zypper)
• installs tmux, clones/updates TPM
• backs up existing ~/.tmux.conf
• runs TPM headlessly to install plugins
• invokes sessions.sh
• wires alias source guard into ~/.bashrc / ~/.zshrc

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 530px; height: 1px; padding-top: 448px; margin-left: 106px;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2) Configuration Layer
• tmux.conf → ~/.tmux.conf
• 256-color + true-color, mouse, 50k history, base-index 1
• intuitive split/nav bindings + reload key (prefix+r)
• TPM plugins: tmux-sensible, tmux-resurrect, tmux-continuum
• auto-save every 15 min, auto-restore on server start

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 530px; height: 1px; padding-top: 705px; margin-left: 106px;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3) Session Management Layer
• sessions.sh
• scans GIT_BASE (default: /mnt/4tb-m2/git) for .git dirs
• derives tmux-safe session name (/ → -, spaces/dots → -)
• creates sessions idempotently (skips existing)
• ensures tmux server is running before creation

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 530px; height: 1px; padding-top: 843px; margin-left: 106px;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4) Alias Layer
• writes ~/.terminility_aliases (regenerated atomically each run)
• one alias per session: tmux new-session -A -s <name> -c <path>
(-A: attach or create; -c: start in repo root)
• install.sh adds source guard to shell RCs (idempotent)

g.text: Repo scanner + session creator + alias generator

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 657px; margin-left: 1078px;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Data Flow
/mnt/4tb-m2/git/**/.git
→ sessions.sh
→ tmux sessions (idempotent)
→ ~/.terminility_aliases
→ ~/.bash_aliases / ~/.zshrc
→ aliases active in every new shell
